name: Indiana IoT Lab
description: Connecting Indiana's best entrepreneurs, startups, and established partners to bring new and exciting Internet of Things solutions to market. A space where forward-thinkers work together to develop the next phase of technology.

name: ArcticRx
tagline: Cool Things. Cool Journey. Cool Planet.
description: ArcticRx is reimagining cold chain logistics with aerospace-engineered reusable thermal pods that keep vaccines, medications, and biologics at precise temperatures — from 2-8°C to -80°C — for 22+ days without batteries or electricity. Built-in NFC tracking. Styrofoam-free. For every pod leased, one is donated to support life-saving medication distribution globally.
